calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218 VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Lyn Bura, CSR: Susan Lee.
Petitioner: Benjamin Fruel Sadang, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Benjamin Claveria Sadang.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: Benjamin Fruel Sadang, present in pro per.
No appearance by counsel of record: Clifford Wang.
Without a valid Proof of Publication, matter is taken off-calendar.
